context: Multi-paragraph description of what the channel is about. Topics covered. Editorial style. Recurring formats. Anything that informs how titles, descriptions, and thumbnails should feel.
tone: casual / educational / authoritative / humorous / spiritual / hype
audience: Target viewer profile: who they are, what they care about, what stage of journey they are in.
default_cta: Like, subscribe, and hit the bell. Drop your questions in the comments.
